race.comment: OAKFIELD UTAH (5) sound return off the one trial, then sent to town with a fading on-pace fourteenth over 1500m at Rosehill in Highway class last start. Can bounce back in this winnable contest. ATHENA'S TREASURE (1) was thrown in the deep end after her eye-catching first-up run over the unsuitable trip, with a battling twelfth over this journey at Randwick in Highway grade. Gets a much better set-up today and shapes as the main danger. HIT SONG (12) goes well at this course and distance and has a key jockey change today. Never travelled in the heavy (8) going with a battling tenth over 1250m at Taree. Best figures measure up nicely and drawn the inside gate again. Each-way. COMMANDO JACK (11) resumes. Jumped in grade when fifth over 1400m at Mudgee. Fitted with a trial win at Bathurst and proven on the heavy surface.
